HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED and modified: Defendant California Pizza Kitchen's Motion To Compel Deposition Answers Of Claudia Magadan is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is granted as to Item 33. Plaintiff's objections to that question are overruled.
While the remaining questions may go to relevant issues, there is a basis for the assertion of the privilege against self-incrimination. Plaintiff may assert her rights under the Fifth Amendment, but is barred from offering testimony about her legal status or any representations she may have made as to her status at the time she obtained employment with Defendant.
All requests for sanctions are denied.
Late opposition has been considered.
MODIFICATION:
Allow #33 to be posed by written deposition.
